focus: Arena Field Edition — delivered the `get.orionfold.com` bootstrap script (deploy/field-edition/bootstrap/get-orionfold.sh + README), the Spark half of the license-workflow §5.2 install entry point. It's the missing bridge between signed-URL delivery and `fieldkit field-edition up`: POSIX sh, dumb + offline-honest — fetches the signed license FIRST (fail-fast on expiry) → ~/.orionfold/license chmod 600, optional Supabase weights (unset for v1, weights stay on HF), installs fieldkit[arena] into a self-contained venv that sidesteps DGX OS PEP-668 (no sudo/apt/--break-system), then runs field-edition doctor → up. Does NO entitlement check of its own (Supabase gated at mint time; fieldkit Ed25519-verifies offline). Lane split confirmed with the operator mid-session: DNS + hosting + signed-URL minting + the order-page snippet are the Website peer's lane — Spark owns the content only. Smoke-tested (guard, bad-payload-rejected-before-install, license-first ordering, chmod 600, venv resolution, skip flags); the smoke caught + fixed a PEP-668 pip failure and a fetch-ordering bug. No version bump / no website rebuild / no fieldkit release (shell + md, outside the website glob and the package). Relay filed [needs Mac action: host + wire]. No commit/push yet — operator gates the main push.
